recommendations.overview: At the height of the First World War, two young British soldiers must cross enemy territory and deliver a message that will stop a deadly attack on hundreds of soldiers.

recommendations.title: Made in Italy
recommendations.overview: A bohemian artist travels from London to Italy with his estranged son to sell the house they inherited from his late wife.

recommendations.title: Guernica
recommendations.overview: The fates of Henry - an American correspondent - and Teresa, one of the Republic's censors during the Spanish Civil War.

recommendations.title: Kelly's Heroes
recommendations.overview: A misfit group of World War II American soldiers goes AWOL to rob a bank behind German lines.

recommendations.title: Deathwatch

recommendations.title: Zulu Dawn
recommendations.overview: In 1879, the British suffer a great loss at the Battle of Isandlwana due to incompetent leadership.

recommendations.title: Cinco de Mayo: The Battle
recommendations.overview: On May 5th, 1862, a few thousand Mexican soldiers put their lives on the line against the world's largest and most powerful army in one legendary battle for freedom and for Mexico.

recommendations.title: Gods
recommendations.overview: Set in communist Poland of the 80s the movie depicts early career of cardio surgeon Zbigniew Religa.

recommendations.title: The Last of the Mohicans

recommendations.title: Inglourious Basterds
